ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_key" TEXT /* Unique key for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the project */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags associated with the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file */,
  "file_language" TEXT /* Programming language of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_hash" TEXT /* Hash value of the file content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_files_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the team belongs to */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_lead" INTEGER /* User ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_teams_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the member belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., developer, tester, reviewer) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions assigned to the team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES project_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the issue */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file the issue belongs to */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of issue (e.g., code smell, bug, vulnerability, security hotspot) */,
  "issue_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the issue (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the issue */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issue_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issue_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
